list_note: The 'filesystem' filter list (flagtab.h:25-29 AUDIT_FILTER_FS) is a DISTINCT list from 'exit'/'task'/'user'/'exclude'. It matches filesystem-type access (here fstype=ext4, fieldtab.h fstype). A parser that only recognizes 'exit' and 'task' will reject this valid rule. Narrowed by auid>=1000 => MEDIUM additive.

rules.note: filesystem filter list (distinct from exit). Matches ext4 access narrowed by auid. MEDIUM additive. 1200 B/event.

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6: narrowed (auid>=1000) syscall MEDIUM. The filesystem list is a parser-coverage point, not an extreme tier.
